project_type: Python FastAPI multi-agent investment analysis system with Jinja2 dashboard
build_system: setuptools via pyproject.toml, Makefile for common tasks
test_framework: pytest in tests/ directory (test_api.py, test_cli.py, test_imports.py, test_registry.py)
verification_instructions: 1) pip install -e . 2) pytest tests/ -v 3) python -c 'from dashboard.app import app; print(app.title)'
environment_constraints: Python available in sandbox, network access for pip install
contribution_requirements: Direct commit to main, no PR needed. Single commit: 'feat: v6.0 - bug fixes + UI/UX overhaul + documentation restructure'
key_patterns: Dashboard: FastAPI + Jinja2 templates in dashboard/templates/, CSS at dashboard/static/css/bloomberg.css, vanilla JS in template blocks. API routes coexist with HTML routes in dashboard/app.py. Personas loaded from src/augur/personas/. Config in config/agents.yaml.
directory_structure: src/augur/ - core engine, personas, bots, CLI. dashboard/ - FastAPI app, templates, static. docs/ - guides, images, SVGs. tests/ - pytest tests. config/ - agents.yaml. personas/ - markdown persona docs.
